description_long: This object consists of two single-story residential houses placed side by side on a shared rectangular base, each with a prominent red gable roof and several smaller outbuildings or extensions with green trim and flat or slightly sloped roofs. The main houses feature dark exterior walls with white-framed windows and doors, and the roofs have a textured, tiled appearance. The houses are separated by a paved area, possibly representing a driveway or courtyard, and each house has a small porch or overhang at the entry. The windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, and the doors are located at the front, accessible from the open paved area. The overall design is compact and practical, with minimal decorative elements, suggesting a utilitarian suburban or rural style. The outbuildings may serve as garages, storage sheds, or utility rooms, and the entire structure is elevated slightly above the ground plane.
description: Two single-story houses with red gable roofs, dark walls, and white-trimmed windows, set on a shared base with small outbuildings and a paved courtyard. The design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses with red gable roofs, main entry doors, and a paved area between them.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, the arrangement of outbuildings, and the sloped roofs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades, additional doors, and the layout of windows and outbuildings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the houses, roof angles, and the alignment of the outbuildings.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with a small porch or overhang, no steps or columns, minimal decorative elements
